blended.narrative: Hoodoo is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 7".
